what_it_does: Declares one RELATION_TYPE dict registering the 'authored_by' board edge-kind: a directed item->session://<id> provenance link with inverse 'authored'.
observations: desc: the board item was authored by this session (item -> session://<id>).
desc calls it a cross-registry provenance edge — the first exercise of the relation-type registry across registries (board item row pointing at a session row).
standouts: Self-described as 'the first exercise of the relation-type registry across registries'.
conventions: Single module-level RELATION_TYPE constant, id matching filename.
Includes inverse ('authored') using optional schema fields.
Target expressed as an address scheme (session://<id>).
notes: The 'authored_by' edge: a board item points to the session that authored it (cross-registry provenance).
questions: Is the inverse 'authored' registered/used anywhere, or only declared here?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — registers exactly the authored_by edge-kind the board_edges constitution describes.
intention_signals: Tries to record who/what authored a board item as a typed link into the session registry, demonstrating relation edges spanning different registries.
novelty: Framed as the inaugural cross-registry relation edge, pointing from a board item row to a session row.
contribution: Contributes the 'authored_by' edge-kind row linking a board item to its authoring session as typed provenance.
summary_for_embedding: A board_edges row declaring the directed 'authored_by' edge-kind linking a board item to the session that authored it, with inverse 'authored'.
intention_for_embedding: To record board-item authorship as a typed cross-registry provenance edge pointing to a session.
